title: Cruel Angels Thesis 2009 Version
wikitext:
[]: Cruel Angel's Thesis 2009 Version             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jan 23, 2009 8:25 pm E of Evangelion Mailing List wrote: Cruel Angel's Thesis 2009 Version CD single Price: Yen- 1143, US$(12.95) Release Date: 25-Mar-2009 Single release from Yoko Takahashi featuring the theme to stunning anime series "Neon Genesis Evangelion" such as "A Cruel Angel's Thesis" and "Fly Me To The Moon" plus her new song. The songs are newly recorded and arranged. http://www.cdjapan.co.jp/detailview.html?KEY=KICM-1272 How many versions of this song have they released now?

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Fri Jan 23, 2009 8:56 pm That would be cool, but it would be better is I could at least hear what the song sounds like.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jan 23, 2009 9:02 pm I know. CDJapan's Japanese page usually has a sample of the songs, but in this case it doesn't. Maybe it's still being recorded or something.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Jan 24, 2009 4:59 am Sounds interesting. I can't wait to hear it.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Jan 24, 2009 4:25 pm There was a link on the eva blog when this was announced a few weeks ago, but I wasn't interested in it and now the page seems to have changed. It's weird, it used to be the main article but now it's gone completely.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Wed Jan 28, 2009 8:03 am That blog is updated daily, the 2009 CAT ver is like 2 pages down. The link's here: http://hb.afl.rakuten.co.jp/hgc/05a31fce.3cd73ea2.05a31fcf.60a63e64/?pc=http%3a%2f%2fitem.rakuten.co.jp%2fguruguru2%2fkicm-1272%2f&m=http%3a%2f%2fm.rakuten.co.jp%2fguruguru2%2fi%2f10545730%2f

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Jan 28, 2009 8:25 pm AchtungAffen wrote: That blog is updated daily, the 2009 CAT ver is like 2 pages down. The link's here: http://hb.afl.rakuten.co.jp/hgc/05a31fce.3cd73ea2.05a31fcf.60a63e64/?pc=http%3a%2f%2fitem.rakuten.co.jp%2fguruguru2%2fkicm-1272%2f&m=http%3a%2f%2fm.rakuten.co.jp%2fguruguru2%2fi%2f10545730%2f

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Thu Jan 29, 2009 3:32 am wait what, google translation?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Jan 29, 2009 6:21 am Xard wrote: wait what, google translation?

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Thu Jan 29, 2009 10:59 am Joseph the PRPD wrote: Is that bad? ...

[]:             Quote Post by CtHuLhU » Fri May 15, 2009 4:56 am A Cruel Angel's Thesis -2009 Version- DL Dunno what about soundtrack for the film but this one original song is pretty good by itself. And still similar to Rebuild's arrangement. Sauce: http://www.nicovideo.jp/watch/sm7029626 It says other part must be soon... (c'mon, release was about 2 days ago)

[]:             Quote Post by JimmyWolk » Fri May 15, 2009 5:35 am CtHuLhU wrote: A Cruel Angel's Thesis -2009 Version- DL Dunno what about soundtrack for the film but this one original song is pretty good by itself. And still similar to Rebuild's arrangement. Sauce: http://www.nicovideo.jp/watch/sm7029626 It says other part must be soon... (c'mon, release was about 2 days ago)

[]:             Quote Post by Lleonard Pler » Fri May 15, 2009 10:53 am It's a weird version/remix, to be honest. I'll have to listen to it more times to decide whether I like it or not.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Fri May 15, 2009 12:23 pm Wow.....that sucked.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Fri May 15, 2009 1:34 pm Action_Bastard wrote: Wow.....that sucked.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri May 15, 2009 2:40 pm I kinda like it.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat May 16, 2009 5:37 pm While I don't necessarily want those almost 5 minutes of my life back, this was alright (I pretty much prefer the original over any remake or remix). I'll admit that it would be nice if it's used somewhere in Rebuild 3.0 or even Final, however.

[]:             Quote Post by PuppetChaos » Sun May 17, 2009 12:53 am It's alright for what it is... but it really seems that it doesn't know what particular kind of remix/rearrangement it wants to be, so it just tried to be everything at once. Is it rock? Is it synth? Is it rave? Is it some sort of strange gospel choir thing? Or just regular J-pop? Also: Is it wrong that at 2:05, I heard the lyrics as: "Party Harrrrd, blahahahjapanese, Party Harrrrrrd, blalaolalalalajapanese"?

[]:             Quote Post by BattleMonkey » Sun May 17, 2009 10:21 am It's all over the place, some of it seemed good but it just seemed very random in it's arrangement. Hopefully not the only version of the song that we will see come out of rebuild.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Wed May 20, 2009 11:39 pm The new version is sooooooo weird. That's the only way to describe it.
